{"parts":[{"content":"try again you didn't do a good job\
\
good spot this is the actual content

•Late referral due to trust deficit /lack of knowledge/ awareness of therapy ?

•Lack of confidence in outcomes and long term survival

•unrealistic long term expectations of a life post transplant.

•Decompensated and thereby marasmic or obese , poor muscle mass

•Secondary organ dysfunction due to chronic hypoxia/hypercarbia

•The lack of a standardised score ( LAS ) to justify allocation

•INTERMACS scoring system while a world standard continues to be an  esoteric resource with low adaption with cardiologists.

•Physical rehabilitation and dietary supplementation generally not a recommendation and

•Lack of local trained rehabilitation therapists and facilities with adequate staffing  & equipment","timestamp":"2026-02-09T00:14:54.339995Z","part_kind":"user-prompt"}],"timestamp":null,"instructions":"","kind":"request","run_id":null,"metadata":null}
